task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender 3D viewport shows the FZK-Haus building model loaded.

task_completion.description: Add at least three shading devices to the exterior south-facing windows
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows at least three new objects (e.g., awnings, louvers, or shutters) placed on the exterior windows of the building.

task_completion.description: Classify the new elements as IfcShadingDevice
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Object Properties panel or IFC classification menu shows the selected new objects assigned the class 'IfcShadingDevice'.

task_completion.description: Set the PredefinedType to AWNING, LOUVER, or SHUTTER
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IFC Object properties show the PredefinedType set to 'AWNING', 'LOUVER', or 'SHUTTER'.

task_completion.description: Assign the shading devices to a spatial container
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender outliner or spatial hierarchy panel shows the new shading devices nested under a spatial container like 'IfcBuildingStorey'.
A save dialog, export menu, or notification indicates the file is being saved to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_solar_shading.ifc'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/BlenderBIM GUI to perform the modeling and classification
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Blender interface (viewport, outliner, properties panels) rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The shading devices appear as actual 3D geometry
integrity.visual_evidence: The shading devices are visible as 3D meshes in the viewport, not just empty nodes or text entries.

integrity.description: The shading devices are placed on the exterior facade
integrity.visual_evidence: The shading devices are placed on the exterior of the building over windows, not floating in empty space.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating at least 3 exterior solar shading devices. They must be classified as 'IfcShadingDevice' with a PredefinedType of AWNING, LOUVER, or SHUTTER. They must be assigned to a spatial container. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_solar_shading.ifc.
